zh.Branxton, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓
zh.Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Venables於大約1500年出生在英國爾金德頓時，她的父親Thomas Venables 12th ggf37歲，母親Cecile Stanley 12th ggm36歲。她於1515年與John Massey De Pontington在英國英格蘭爾維拉爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她於1557年住在英國爾伯頓。她去世於1557年11月3日在英國英格蘭爾維拉爾享年58歲，埋葬在英國爾伯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Venables于大约1500年出生在英国爾金德頓时，她的父亲Thomas Venables 12th ggf37岁，母亲Cecile Stanley 12th ggm36岁。她于1515年与John Massey De Pontington在英国英格兰爾維拉爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她于1557年住在英国爾伯頓。她去世于1557年11月3日在英国英格兰爾維拉爾享年58岁，埋葬在英国爾伯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Venables was born about 1500, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, her father, Thomas Venables 12th ggf, was 37 and her mother, Cecile Stanley 12th ggm, was 36. She married John Massey De Pontington in 1515, in Wirral, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She lived in Burton, Cheshire, England in 1557. She died on 3 November 1557, in Wirral, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Burton, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Venables est née environ 1500, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Venables 12th ggf, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Cecile Stanley 12th ggm, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé John Massey De Pontington en 1515, à Wirral, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle a vécu à Burton, Cheshire, Angleterre en 1557. Elle est décédée le 3 novembre 1557, à Wirral, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterrée à Burton, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Venables um 1500 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Venables 12th ggf 37 und ihre Mutter Cecile Stanley 12th ggm 36. Sie hat 1515 in Wirral, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom John Massey De Pontington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1557 hat sie in Burton, Cheshire, England gelebt. Sie starb am 3. November 1557 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Wirral, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Burton, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Venables è nata il circa 1500 nel Kinderton, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Venables 12th ggf, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Cecile Stanley 12th ggm, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato John Massey De Pontington nel 1515, nel Wirral, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Burton, Cheshire, England nel 1557. Morì il 3 novembre 1557, nel Wirral, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolta a Burton, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Venablesが約1500年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで生まれた時，父Thomas Venables 12th ggfは37歳，母Cecile Stanley 12th ggmは36歳であった。1515年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウィラルでJohn Massey De Pontingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1557年にはイギリスチェシュアイアブルトンに住んでいた。彼女は1557年11月3日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアウィラルで58歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアブルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Venables(이)가 대략 1500년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Venables 12th ggf(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecile Stanley 12th ggm(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 위럴에서 John Massey De Pontington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1557년도에 영국 체실르 버턴에서 살았다. 그녀는 1557년 11월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 위럴에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 버턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Venables nasceu aproximadamente 1500, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Venables 12th ggf, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Cecile Stanley 12th ggm, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com John Massey De Pontington em 1515, em Wirral, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela viveu em Burton, Cheshire, Inglaterra em 1557. Ela faleceu em 3 de novembro de 1557, em Wirral, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Burton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Venables родилась около 1500 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Venables 12th ggf было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecile Stanley 12th ggm, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Massey De Pontington в 1515 г. в местности вирраль, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она жила в местности буртон, чешир, Англия в 1557 году. Она умерла 3 ноября 1557 г. в местности вирраль, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности буртон, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Venables nació aproximadamente 1500, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Venables 12th ggf, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Cecile Stanley 12th ggm, tenía 36 años. Se casó con John Massey De Pontington en 1515, en Wirral, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en Burton, Cheshire, Inglaterra en 1557. Murió el 3 de noviembre de 1557, en Wirral, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultada en Burton, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
